ol.li: VPN Translation: Handled by MMU via CR3 register path.
Alignment: Pages are always aligned to 2^12 (4KB) boundaries.
TLB: VPN is used as the key for Translation Lookaside Buffer tags.

div.p: c // va = 32-bit Virtual Address #define PAGE_SHIFT 12 #define PAGE_MASK 0xFFF
uint32_t vpn = (va >> PAGE_SHIFT); uint32_t offset = (va & PAGE_MASK);

g.title: Used by MMU to index Page Directory and Page Table
Directly mapped to Physical Address bits [11:0]

path.d: M NaN NaN L NaN NaN

g.title: Used by MMU to index Page Directory and Page Table
Directly mapped to Physical Address bits [11:0]
